name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for Emplorer
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the user or platform problem this request is trying to solve.

## Proposed change

Describe the feature or improvement you want to see.

## Why it fits Emplorer

Explain how this supports the project's purpose as a company reviews platform with review critique and discussion workflows.

## Possible implementation notes

Mention any likely API changes, schema changes, moderation concerns, or testing impact.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Include mockups, examples, related issues, or reference material if useful.
